name: English Muffin with Ham, Tomatoes, and Pesto
recipeIngredient: 12 Slices Deli Baked Ham (cut to fit muffin halves)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove butter and cream cheese from the refrigerator and allow them to soften.
2. Cream together the cream cheese and softened butter until fluffy.
3. Blend in the minced garlic.
4. Place the muffin halves on a baking sheet.
5. Spread each with a portion of the cheese mixture.
6. Top each muffin half with a slice of ham and a slice of tomato.
7. Spread pesto on top of each tomato, using about 1 tablespoon per tomato.
8. Place a dollop of the cream cheese mixture on top of each muffin.
9. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes, or until the cheese has melted and is slightly browned.
Pesto:
4 Cups Fresh Basil Leaves (washed and stripped from stems)
4 Cloves Garlic
1/4 Cup Olive Oil
1/4 Cup Pine Nuts
1 Cup Freshly Grated Parmesan Cheese
Blend all ingredients together in a blender until a paste forms. You may need to push the mixture down with a spatula several times.
Freeze any leftover pesto and cut into 1-inch cubes for serving with pasta.
